# UC-12.3.20 · Ansible Role Dependency Galaxy Install Failures in CI

## Description

Failed role downloads break immutable build artifacts and supply chain pinning.

## Value

Surfaces Galaxy or private automation hub outages affecting pipelines.

## Implementation

Hash `requirements.yml` in events; alert when the same hash fails repeatedly.

## SPL

```spl
index=iac sourcetype="gitlab:pipeline" OR sourcetype="ansible:log"
| search "galaxy" AND ("install" OR "requirements") AND ("HTTP" OR "error" OR "failed")
| stats count by project_path, playbook
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Bar chart (failures by project), Timeline.

## References

- [AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)](https://github.com/ansible/awx/blob/devel/docs/logging_integration.md)
- [Splunk HEC — HTTP Event Collector](https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/Splunk/latest/Data/UsetheHTTPEventCollector)
